articles.title: Customers say Trump Mobile is leaking their personal information
articles.description: Trump Mobile is leaking customers’ email and home addresses, but has not responded to people alerting the company of the data exposure, according to two YouTubers who said they verified that their leaked data is authentic.

articles.title: EU opens MiCA consultation to review if crypto framework is still fit for purpose
articles.description: The European Commission is seeking feedback on whether the EU’s landmark crypto regulatory framework remains suitable as digital asset markets and global policies evolve.

articles.title: 最新》三星勞資雙方戲劇性達成協議，工會宣布暫緩  21 日發動全面罷工
articles.description: 根據韓國媒體報導，三星電子勞資雙方在原訂總罷工的前一個半小時，戲劇性地達成初步協議，成功避免了半導體生產可能面 […]

articles.title: Intuit to lay off over 3,000 employees to refocus on AI
articles.description: In a memo to employees, CEO Sasan Goodarzi said the layoffs are meant to reduce complexity, simplify the company's corporate structure, and deliver better AI products.

articles.title: AI search startups are blowing up
articles.description: AI search has quietly become one of the most attractive targets in consumer AI.

articles.title: Stability AI releases a new audio model that can create six-minute songs
articles.description: Stability Audio 3.0 small model can run on-device and generate two-minute long tracks

articles.title: Crypto campaign cash from Fairshake flooded Southern primaries, picked winners
articles.description: The leading industry super PAC claimed a "6-0 sweep" in the primaries in Kentucky, Alabama and Georgia, though one big race awaits a runoff.

articles.title: Ethereum traders warn of a ‘nasty’ ETH price drop if $2K support breaks
articles.description: Ethereum is flashing a warning of a familiar bearish pattern that preceded a 41% drop in January, raising risks of a fresh breakdown.

articles.title: South Korean funeral company reveals $33 million loss on leveraged ether ETF bet
articles.description: A Seoul-based funeral services firm disclosed tens of millions of dollars in unrealized losses tied to leveraged ether ETF investments.

articles.title: EU opens consultation on MiCA stablecoin rules and DeFi gaps
articles.description: EU opens MiCA review as consultation probes stablecoin interest rules, DeFi risks and classification gaps ahead of July's crypto authorization deadline.

articles.title: Live markets: Crypto prices buoyed by Trump's 'final stages' remark
articles.description: Bitcoin is lower by more than 4% over the past week, but has remained in a very tight range around $77,000 for the last three days.

articles.title: Raoul Pal says AI and crypto are reshaping the global economy faster than most think
articles.description: The Real Vision founder said that humanity is entering an “exponential age” where AI, crypto and tokenization could rewrite finance, labor and culture.

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin outlines Ethereum's privacy measures. Here is what it means for the network and ETH
articles.description: Privacy is widely seen as a necessary feature for the widespread adoption of blockchain technology. Ethereum is taking steps in that direction.

articles.title: Fireblocks launches agentic payment support, joins x402 Foundation
articles.description: If even a fraction of the more than 1 billion people who use AI daily delegate authority to AI agents for online spending, stablecoin adoption would grow substantially, a Fireblocks executive said.

articles.title: NanoClaw creator turns down $20M buyout offer, raises $12M seed instead
articles.description: NanoCo, the company behind  OpenClaw alternative NanoClaw, has raised a $12 million seed after a viral launch, the founders tell TechCrunch.

articles.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close in one week: Window to nominate and apply for the most promising startups ends May 27
articles.description: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27. Pitch at TechCrunch Disrupt, get investor access, win $100K, plus more scaling perks. Nominate an early-stage founder or submit your startup here.

articles.title: GitHub says hackers stole data from thousands of internal repositories
articles.description: The code hosting giant GitHub said it was investigating a breach, but said there was no evidence of customer data theft.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI), up 3.7%, leads index higher
articles.description: Bittensor (TAO) gained 2.1%, joining Uniswap (UNI) as a top performer.

articles.title: This Bitcoin price model targets ‘conservative’ $255K by year-end
articles.description: Earlier, analysts at Bernstein and BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes also projected Bitcoin to reach new record highs in 2026.
